prediction.reasoning: For an 18-day prediction horizon, I assume AMZN follows geometric Brownian motion with historical volatility around 35% annually. The point estimate equals current price under efficient market hypothesis. Confidence intervals account for typical daily volatility of ~2.2%, resulting in cumulative 18-day standard deviation of approximately 9.3%. Intervals are symmetric around current price reflecting no directional bias.
